generation.sourceCode:
import React from 'react';
import { Card, Stack, Text, Box } from '@ggui-ai/design/primitives';

interface Props {
  /** City name */
  city: string;
  /** Current temperature */
  temperature: number;
  /** Weather condition (Sunny, Cloudy, Rainy, etc.) */
  condition: string;
  /** Humidity percentage */
  humidity: number;
  /** Wind speed */
  windSpeed: number;
  /** Temperature unit (C or F) */
  unit?: string;
  /** 5-day forecast array */
  forecast: Array<{ day?: string; icon?: string; high?: number; low?: number }>;
}

export default function GeneratedComponent({
  city = 'City',
  temperature = 0,
  condition = 'Unknown',
  humidity = 0,
  windSpeed = 0,
  unit = 'C',
  forecast = [],
}: Props) {
  return (
    <Card
      shadow="md"
      radius="lg"
      padding="var(--ggui-spacing-4, 16px)"
      border
    >
      <Stack gap="var(--ggui-spacing-4, 16px)">
        <Stack gap="var(--ggui-spacing-1, 4px)">
          <Text
            variant="overline"
            color="var(--ggui-color-onSurfaceVariant, #52525b)"
          >
            {city}
          </Text>
          <Text
            size="4xl"
            weight="bold"
            color="var(--ggui-color-onSurface, #18181b)"
            as="div"
            aria-label={`Current temperature ${temperature}°${unit}`}
          >
            {temperature}°{unit}
          </Text>
          <Text
            variant="bodyLarge"
            color="var(--ggui-color-onSurfaceVariant, #52525b)"
            as="div"
            aria-label={`Weather condition ${condition}`}
          >
            {condition}
          </Text>
        </Stack>

        <Stack direction="horizontal" gap="var(--ggui-spacing-4, 16px)" wrap>
          <Box
            padding="var(--ggui-spacing-2, 8px)"
            background="var(--ggui-color-surfaceVariant, #f4f4f5)"
            borderRadius="var(--ggui-shape-radius-md, 8px)"
          >
            <Stack gap="var(--ggui-spacing-1, 4px)">
              <Text variant="caption" color="var(--ggui-color-onSurfaceVariant, #52525b)">
                Humidity
              </Text>
              <Text variant="label" color="var(--ggui-color-onSurface, #18181b)">
                {humidity}%
              </Text>
            </Stack>
          </Box>

          <Box
            padding="var(--ggui-spacing-2, 8px)"
            background="var(--ggui-color-surfaceVariant, #f4f4f5)"
            borderRadius="var(--ggui-shape-radius-md, 8px)"
          >
            <Stack gap="var(--ggui-spacing-1, 4px)">
              <Text variant="caption" color="var(--ggui-color-onSurfaceVariant, #52525b)">
                Wind
              </Text>
              <Text variant="label" color="var(--ggui-color-onSurface, #18181b)">
                {windSpeed}
              </Text>
            </Stack>
          </Box>
        </Stack>

        <Box
          padding="var(--ggui-spacing-2, 8px)"
          background="var(--ggui-color-surfaceVariant, #f4f4f5)"
          borderRadius="var(--ggui-shape-radius-md, 8px)"
        >
          <Stack
            direction="horizontal"
            justify="between"
            align="start"
            gap="var(--ggui-spacing-2, 8px)"
            wrap
            aria-label="5-day forecast"
          >
            {forecast.map((item, index) => (
              <Stack
                key={`${item.day ?? 'day'}-${index}`}
                gap="var(--ggui-spacing-1, 4px)"
                align="center"
              >
                <Text variant="caption" color="var(--ggui-color-onSurfaceVariant, #52525b)">
                  {item.day ?? '--'}
                </Text>
                <Text
                  size="xl"
                  as="div"
                  aria-label={`Forecast icon ${item.icon ?? ''}`}
                  color="var(--ggui-color-onSurface, #18181b)"
                >
                  {item.icon ?? '❔'}
                </Text>
                <Text variant="bodySmall" color="var(--ggui-color-onSurface, #18181b)">
                  {item.high ?? '--'}° / {item.low ?? '--'}°
                </Text>
              </Stack>
            ))}
          </Stack>
        </Box>
      </Stack>
    </Card>
  );
}

evaluation.critique: The component excellently uses design tokens throughout and properly structures data from props with sensible defaults. However, it lacks interactive polish (no hover/focus states on the metric boxes or forecast items), and the weather icon emoji approach is functional but visually unrefined compared to dedicated icon systems.

generation.sourceCode:
import React from 'react';
import { Card, Stack, Text, Heading, Divider, Box, Spacer } from '@ggui-ai/design/primitives';

interface Props {
  /** City name */
  city: string;
  /** Current temperature */
  temperature: number;
  /** Weather condition (Sunny, Cloudy, Rainy, etc.) */
  condition: string;
  /** Humidity percentage */
  humidity: number;
  /** Wind speed */
  windSpeed: number;
  /** Temperature unit (C or F) */
  unit?: string;
  /** 5-day forecast array */
  forecast: Array<{ day?: string; icon?: string; high?: number; low?: number }>;
}

/**
 * WeatherCard Component
 * 
 * A clean, data-focused weather dashboard showing current conditions
 * and an upcoming 5-day forecast strip.
 */
export default function WeatherCard({
  city = "San Francisco",
  temperature = 22,
  condition = "Partly Cloudy",
  humidity = 64,
  windSpeed = 12,
  unit = "C",
  forecast = [
    { day: "Mon", icon: "☀️", high: 24, low: 18 },
    { day: "Tue", icon: "⛅", high: 22, low: 17 },
    { day: "Wed", icon: "☁️", high: 20, low: 16 },
    { day: "Thu", icon: "🌦️", high: 19, low: 15 },
    { day: "Fri", icon: "🌧️", high: 18, low: 14 }
  ]
}: Props) {
  const currentEmoji = (forecast && forecast.length > 0 && forecast[0].icon) || "☀️";
  
  return (
    <Card 
      padding={32} 
      radius="xl" 
      shadow="md"
      border
      // Surface background provided by design system tokens inside Card
    >
      <Stack gap={24}>
        {/* City and Current Time Heading */}
        <Stack direction="horizontal" justify="between" align="center">
          <Stack gap={4}>
            <Heading level={2} color="var(--ggui-color-onSurface)">
              {city}
            </Heading>
            <Text variant="caption" color="var(--ggui-color-onSurfaceVariant)">
              {new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-US', { weekday: 'long', month: 'long', day: 'numeric' })}
            </Text>
          </Stack>
          <Box padding={8} borderRadius={12} background="var(--ggui-color-primary-50)">
            <Text variant="label" weight="semibold" color="var(--ggui-color-primary-700)">
              Updated Now
            </Text>
          </Box>
        </Stack>

        {/* Hero Temp & Condition Section */}
        <Stack direction="horizontal" align="center" gap={32} wrap>
          <Stack direction="horizontal" align="start">
             <Text 
               size="4xl" 
               weight="bold" 
               color="var(--ggui-color-onSurface)"
               style={{ fontSize: 'var(--ggui-font-size-4xl, 48px)', lineHeight: 1 }}
             >
               {Math.round(temperature)}
             </Text>
             <Text size="xl" weight="semibold" color="var(--ggui-color-primary-600)" style={{ marginTop: '4px' }}>
               °{unit}
             </Text>
          </Stack>

          <Stack gap={2}>
            <Stack direction="horizontal" align="center" gap={8}>
              <Box style={{ fontSize: '24px' }}>{currentEmoji}</Box>
              <Text variant="bodyLarge" weight="semibold" color="var(--ggui-color-onSurface)">
                {condition}
              </Text>
            </Stack>
            <Text variant="caption" color="var(--ggui-color-onSurfaceVariant)">
              Feels like {Math.round(temperature - 2)}°
            </Text>
          </Stack>
        </Stack>

        {/* Detail Stats Section */}
        <Stack direction="horizontal" justify="start" gap={48} wrap>
          <Stack direction="horizontal" align="center" gap={12}>
            <Box 
              padding={10} 
              borderRadius="md" 
              background="var(--ggui-color-surfaceVariant)"
            >
              <Text size="lg">💧</Text>
            </Box>
            <Stack gap={0}>
              <Text variant="label" weight="bold" color="var(--ggui-color-onSurface)">
                {humidity}%
              </Text>
              <Text variant="caption" color="var(--ggui-color-onSurfaceVariant)">
                Humidity
              </Text>
            </Stack>
          </Stack>

          <Stack direction="horizontal" align="center" gap={12}>
            <Box 
              padding={10} 
              borderRadius="md" 
              background="var(--ggui-color-surfaceVariant)"
            >
              <Text size="lg">🌬️</Text>
            </Box>
            <Stack gap={0}>
              <Text variant="label" weight="bold" color="var(--ggui-color-onSurface)">
                {windSpeed} km/h
              </Text>
              <Text variant="caption" color="var(--ggui-color-onSurfaceVariant)">
                Wind Speed
              </Text>
            </Stack>
          </Stack>
        </Stack>

        <Divider margin={8} color="var(--ggui-color-outlineVariant)" />

        {/* 5-Day Forecast Strip */}
        <Stack gap={16}>
          <Text variant="overline" color="var(--ggui-color-onSurfaceVariant)">
            5-Day Forecast
          </Text>
          
          <Stack direction="horizontal" justify="between" gap={8}>
            {forecast.map((item, idx) => (
              <Box 
                key={item.day || idx} 
                style={{ flex: 1 }} 
              >
                <Stack align="center" gap={12}>
                  <Text variant="caption" weight="semibold" color="var(--ggui-color-onSurfaceVariant)">
                    {item.day}
                  </Text>
                  
                  <Box style={{ fontSize: '24px' }}>
                    {item.icon}
                  </Box>
                  
                  <Stack gap={2} align="center">
                    <Text variant="label" weight="bold" color="var(--ggui-color-onSurface)">
                      {item.high}°
                    </Text>
                    <Text variant="caption" color="var(--ggui-color-onSurfaceVariant)">
                      {item.low}°
                    </Text>
                  </Stack>
                </Stack>
              </Box>
            ))}
          </Stack>
        </Stack>
      </Stack>
    </Card>
  );
}

evaluation.critique: The component has good hierarchy and mostly uses design tokens, but contains several violations: inline style overrides for font-size (48px, 24px), hardcoded pixel padding/margins (8px, 4px, 32px, 24px, 12px, 10px), and default forecast data in props that should be empty. Missing hover/focus states and transitions for interactivity polish.
